query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('studios','offerings','opportunities','academy_content') AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 20 ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3addFH5ZZ41CXyi.root --database bC6Pj8ksngxNy5fe35WqgW --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('studios','offerings','opportunities','academy_content') AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 20 ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION

studios	pricePerHour

studios	capacity
